M0150_CPY_MCAREHMO (M0150) Medicare HMO/Managed Care Current payment sources for home care: Medicare (HMO/managed care). 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0150_CPY_NONE (M0150) No Charge for Current Services Current payment sources for home care: none, no charge for current services. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
